import re

with open\('app.css', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find all rules for the selectors mentioned
selectors = ['topnav', 'topbar', 'navbar-custom', 'ebank-btn', 'btn-enajava', 
             'btn-eregistration', 'win-icon', 'home-what-i-need', 'topbar-right-menu']

# Pattern to match CSS rules: selector { content }
pattern = r'\\.\(' + '|'.join\(s.replace\('-', r'\\-'\) for s in selectors\) + r'\)[^{]*\\{[^}]*\\}'

matches = re.findall\(pattern, content\)

for selector in selectors:
    # More specific pattern for each selector
    sel_pattern = r'\\.' + selector.replace\('-', r'\\-'\) + r'[^\\{]*\\{[^}]*\\}'
    rules = re.findall\(sel_pattern, content, re.DOTALL\)
    if rules:
        print\(f"\\n=== {selector} ==="\)
        for rule in rules[:5]:  # First 5 matches
            print\(rule[:200]\)

import json
with open\('scraped-data/homepage.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)

print\(\)
print\('HeroSlides count:', len\(d.get\('heroSlides', []\)\)\)
if d.get\('heroSlides'\):
    print\('First slide keys:', list\(d['heroSlides'][0].keys\(\)\)\)
    print\('First slide:', json.dumps\(d['heroSlides'][0], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)
print\(\)
print\('FeatureIconLinks count:', len\(d.get\('featureIconLinks', []\)\)\)
print\(\)
print\('ApplyOnline:', json.dumps\(d.get\('applyOnline', {}\), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)
print\(\)
print\('PromoBanners count:', len\(d.get\('promoBanners', []\)\)\)
if d.get\('promoBanners'\):
    print\('PromoBanners:', json.dumps\(d['promoBanners'], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)
print\(\)
print\('LatestNews count:', len\(d.get\('latestNews', []\)\)\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\User1\\Desktop\\STBWeb" && python3 -c "
import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('scraped-data/homepage.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)

print\('=== HERO SLIDES ==='\)
for i, s in enumerate\(d.get\('heroSlides', []\)\):
    print\(f'  [{i}] desktopImageLocalPath={s.get\(\\"desktopImageLocalPath\\"\)} mobileImageLocalPath={s.get\(\\"mobileImageLocalPath\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'       desktopImageUrl={s.get\(\\"desktopImageUrl\\"\)} mobileImageUrl={s.get\(\\"mobileImageUrl\\"\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== APPLY ONLINE ==='\)
ao = d.get\('applyOnline', {}\)
print\(f'  imageLocalPath={ao.get\(\\"imageLocalPath\\"\)} imageUrl={ao.get\(\\"imageUrl\\"\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== PROMO BANNERS ==='\)
for p in d.get\('promoBanners', []\):
    print\(f'  name={p.get\(\\"name\\"\)} imageLocalPath={p.get\(\\"imageLocalPath\\"\)} imageUrl={p.get\(\\"imageUrl\\"\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== LATEST NEWS \(first 3\) ==='\)
for n in d.get\('latestNews', []\)[:3]:
    print\(f'  thumbnailLocalPath={n.get\(\\"thumbnailLocalPath\\"\)} thumbnailUrl={n.get\(\\"thumbnailUrl\\"\)}'\)
")
